instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders an ordered list from a sequence `steps` of instruction strings. Prefix each step with its one-based index. Escape all step text.
code:
<#-- Model: steps: sequence of strings --> <#if steps?has_content>
    <#list steps as step>
  1. ${step?index + 1}. ${step?html}
<#else>

No steps available.
